metadata.description: Target key definitions that override or extend classification.json. Keys defined here with status 'classified' will be added or override classification.json. Keys with status 'pending' will be disabled.

Per-tool allow/deny rules for the unified tool permission pipeline (v2 new, non-migration)
Tone preset (default / concise / pragmatic / enthusiastic) injected as the output_style section of the AI's system prompt
Opt-in: scan ~/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md when building the agent skill catalog
Opt-in: scan ~/.codex/skills/*/SKILL.md when building the agent skill catalog
Opt-in: scan ~/.agent/skills/*/SKILL.md when building the agent skill catalog
Global default: context-chef enabled (truncate + compact + optional compress). Assistant/topic may override.

Global default: character threshold for tool-result persistence. Chef writes the full payload to a file under feature.context_chef.vfs and replaces the inline result with a <persisted-output> marker (containing the absolute path); the model uses fs__read to retrieve. Read tools (fs__read) are exempt — they return their own too-large error to force native pagination.
Global default: LLM-based history compression. Off by default (paid). Even when on, compression only runs if a compression model resolves (explicit pick or fallback to topic.naming.model_id).
Global default: explicit compression model (UniqueModelId 'providerId::modelId'). null = fall back to topic.naming.model_id at request time.
